title: The Magic Serpent
actors: Hiroki Matsukata, Tomoko Ogawa, Ryûtarô Ôtomo
plot: In ancient Japan, a good lord is killed and his throne is taken by the trecherous Yuki Daijo and his wizard friend Oroki-maru. The young prince Ikazuki-maru is rescued from the jaws of death by a magic bird sent by a wizard. Ten y...
